hero_desc: An ad-free, fully secured note-taking application. Sync and use across all your devices.
soft_desc: Canolia Note supports all major operating systems.
pkg_desc: Upgrade for an ad-free experience and unlimited Cloud Sync features.
privacy_intro_h: Thank you for using Canolia Note
privacy_intro_p: We prioritize the security of your personal information. This policy explains how we handle your data when you use our App.
privacy_1_p: We may collect the following information:
privacy_1_li1: Note Data: Notes you write, including titles and formatted text.
privacy_1_li2: Preferences: Settings you choose within the App, such as Themes (Aurora, Neumorphic, etc.) and time format (24-hour system).
privacy_1_li3: Device Information: Basic data such as OS version and device model used to improve the App's performance.
privacy_2_p: The collected information is used for the following purposes:
privacy_2_li1: To ensure the App's features function correctly.
privacy_2_li2: To store and organize your notes systematically.
privacy_2_li3: To remember your chosen settings and preferences.
privacy_3_li1: Local Storage: All your notes are primarily stored directly on your device (Phone).
privacy_3_li2: Cloud Sync: If you use the Sync feature, your data will be stored on a secure Cloud Server. Please note that this feature is currently in a beta/testing phase.
privacy_4_p: When you share your notes as PDF, PNG, or Text to other applications (e.g., Viber, Telegram, WhatsApp), the privacy policies of those specific third-party applications will apply.
privacy_5_p: We strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your information from unauthorized access. However, please be aware that no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacy_6_p: You can edit or delete your notes within the App at any time. If you uninstall the App, all data stored in your Local Storage will be permanently removed.
privacy_7_p: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, you can contact us at:
knowledge_desc: Explore articles about philosophy, finance, and planning.
